subject: FW: Signed Engagement Letter
body:
From: dwight staffelbach [mailto:bcninc@gmail.com] 
Sent: Friday, May 16, 2008 10:38 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fwd: Signed Engagement Letter

 

Leslie:  My apologies for the errors

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: dwight staffelbach <bcninc@gmail.com>
Date: Thu, May 15, 2008 at 7:18 PM
Subject: Fwd: Signed Engagement Letter
To: lgroff@nycsmail.com


Leslie:  bob spoke with Jeffrey today and he requested we send some
docs.  Here they are but I got a litle different email address.  Please
see that he gets this info. Regards, Dwight S.

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: dwight staffelbach <bcninc@gmail.com>

Date: Mon, May 12, 2008 at 6:35 PM
Subject: Fwd: Signed Engagement Letter

To: Warren Strauss <wrrnstrss@earthlink.net>


Warren

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: <duane.lee@vmd.desjardins.com>
Date: Fri, May 9, 2008 at 1:08 PM
Subject: Signed Engagement Letter
To: bcninc@gmail.com
Cc: nitin.kaushal@vmd.desjardins.com



Hi Bob,

Here is the signed engagement letter. Let me know if you need anything
else.

Duane.

(See attached file: May 9, 2008 Scan.pdf)
______________________________
Duane Lee
Vice President, Investment Banking
Desjardins Securities Inc.

145 King Street West, Suite 2750
Toronto, Ontario, M5H 1J8

Tel: 416-867-3793
Cell: 416-523-9795
Fax: 416-861-9992

duane.lee@vmd.desjardins.com
